series_metadata.series_description: Records used by the Chancellor and agency staff to make a determination regarding the issuance of directives. Includes but is not limited to documentation provided by institutions and third parties, staff research on the topic and public comments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 10 years then review by State Archives. If State Archives doesn''t want the records, then destroy ; Electronic: 10 years then review by State Archives. If State Archives doesn''t want the records then destroy, Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
